allow: Bash(venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "from services.hwpx_generator import generate_hwpx; print\('import OK'\)")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $body = '{"text":"ping"}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/echo" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body -TimeoutSec 8; Write-Host "백엔드 정상: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "아직 시작 중 또는 오류: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
